UserComments.Comment: Do not exceed 3hrs.of continuous charging to avoid extra fees. I could never change here:Both Mennekes sockets were always busy,when I was here & the Schuko socket is out of order & they r obviously unwilling to fix it,always,when I was here,it was broken(or intentionally disabled?).Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: Extra fee for exceeding 3hrs. of continuous charging. To fully charge your battery restart charging every 3hrs..

AddressInfo.Title: EVN Public Charging Station.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Public access, 2 dedicated parking places & more common parking places, all steep,Mennekes sockets r almost always busy,extreme long waiting times,Schuko socket out of order for long time,indefinitely, or permanently, may be decommissioned, but not unmounted.

Connections.Comments: Tried several times,visited the place twice in 5 months interval & never worked.When asked the operator to fix it,they ignored my request.

GeneralComments: On main town square in downtown.
